allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== TOOLING ==="; foreach \($t in @\('node','pnpm','npm','git','npx'\)\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "$t -> $\(\(& $t --version\) 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1\)" } else { "$t -> NOT FOUND" } }; Write-Output "=== DIR CONTENTS ==="; Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name,Length,Mode | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String)
